parameters.query: SELECT register_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE proposed_at::date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'PROPOSED' GROUP BY register_name ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT proposed_data->>'commitment' AS commitment, proposed_data->>'made_to' AS made_to, proposed_data->>'due_date' AS due_date FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE register_name = 'commitments' AND status IN ('PROPOSED', 'CONFIRMED') AND (proposed_data->>'due_date')::date <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 ORDER BY proposed_data->>'due_date' ASC LIMIT 10;

meta.description: GET /webhook/midday-checkin — returns today's extraction summary, upcoming commitments, and email status. Glance Midday touchpoint.
